title: linum gallicum subsp. strictum
intro: Linum gallicum subsp. strictum, also known as the strict flax or rigid flax, is a subspecies of the Linum gallicum plant, a type of flowering plant in the flax family (Linaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Linum gallicum subsp. strictum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
